options.name: Healing Spirit
options.effect_text: Until the start of your next turn, allies standing in or entering for the first time heal 1d6.

options.name: Pained Spirit
options.effect_text: The spirit moves to a chosen ally; that ally’s attacks deal +1d4 arcane.

features.notes: Grants Primeval Skin, access to Augmentation, and choice of 2 Conduit cantrips.

options.name: Hunter’s Stride
options.effect_text: Target gains +2 stealth and cannot become crippled for 1 minute.

options.name: Primordial Strike
options.effect_text: Melee weapon spell attack; on hit add extra weapon dice equal to half Tier (minimum 1), in a chosen elemental type.

options.name: Primeval Lure
options.effect_text: Ranged spell attack vs Body; hit deals 1d6 elemental and pulls target closer.

options.name: Primeval Rebuke
options.effect_text: Aura on a willing creature; when hit in melee, the attacker takes 1d6 elemental.

options.name: Primeval Ward
options.effect_text: Gain resistance against triggering elemental damage equal to your spellcasting modifier.

options.name: Unseen Messenger
options.effect_text: A whispering mote delivers a short message.

options.name: Volatile Burst
options.effect_text: Self/engagement pulse dealing 1d8 spirit.

options.name: Wild Hunt
options.effect_text: +2 Investigation in the current zone and ignore Strain from darkness, foliage, and light cover.

features.notes: Upgrades to Full-caster, gains Conjuration, and grants choice of 2 Channeler cantrips.

options.name: Primeval Lure
options.effect_text: Pull effect with 1d6 elemental.

options.name: Primeval Rebuke
options.effect_text: Aura; when the target is hit, it releases 2d4 elemental.

options.name: Primeval Ward
options.effect_text: Gain resistance to a chosen elemental equal to your spellcasting modifier.

options.name: Primordial Arrow
options.effect_text: Hit deals 1d6 puncture + 2d4 chosen elemental.

options.name: Spirit’s Burden
options.effect_text: Hit deals 2d4 slash; critical hit prevents Dash until your next turn.

options.name: Unseen Messenger
options.effect_text: Short message delivery.

options.name: Verdant Hand
options.effect_text: Causes small plant growth or bloom for 1 hour.

features.notes: Gain 2 Altered Skin options.

options.name: Annealed
options.effect_text: Skin can receive a magical augmentation.

options.name: Prowler
options.effect_text: Gain low-light and dim-light vision within Close.

options.name: Shimmer
options.effect_text: Gain Resolve on stealth-related checks.

options.name: Regenerative
options.effect_text: During a respite, restore extra vitality equal to Will.

features.notes: Choose one mantle during Daily Preparation.

options.name: Flame
options.effect_text: Retaliate once per round on a melee miss for spellcasting-modifier damage.

options.name: Frost
options.effect_text: Gain temporary vitality equal to Tier × 2 + spellcasting modifier; when broken, deal 2d6 frost in Burst (Touch).

options.name: Land
options.effect_text: Gain charges equal to your spellcasting modifier for physical resistance once per round.

options.name: Sky
options.effect_text: Deal 1d4 electric in retaliation and give the attacker Strain against you until end of turn.

options.name: Water
options.effect_text: Add 1d4 to vitality and Ambition restoration effects.

features.notes: Adds new summonable spirit aspects; select the relevant aspect when using the feature.

options.name: Hastened Spirit
options.effect_text: Grants +1 AP once per ally in its zone.

options.name: Protecting Spirit
options.effect_text: Grants 2d12 floating shield when an ally first steps within Touch.

options.name: Soothing
options.effect_text: Heals 1 Wound on interaction within Touch.

options.name: Vengeful Spirit
options.effect_text: Makes ranged attacks when allies in its zone are hit, dealing 2d4 fire.

features.notes: Gain 2 new Altered Skin options.

options.name: Aquatic Gills
options.effect_text: Breathe underwater and swim through strong currents.

options.name: Redundant Organs
options.effect_text: Immune to poison damage; gain Resolve against poisoned.

options.name: Conductive Nerves
options.effect_text: After taking damage, your next melee attack deals +1d6 electric.

options.name: Thermal Conversion
options.effect_text: Gain resistance to fire and cold; extreme temperatures do not cause weakened.

features.notes: Choose additional evolved-form access.

options.name: Monstrosities
options.effect_text: Gain evolved-form access to Monstrosities.

options.name: Occult
options.effect_text: Gain evolved-form access to Occult.

features.notes: Bond with a Primeval Vessel and gain the matching effect.

options.name: Hastened
options.effect_text: Gain +1 AP.

options.name: Healing
options.effect_text: Spend 2 AP to heal 2d6 vitality within Touch.

options.name: Pained
options.effect_text: All offensive actions deal +2d4 arcane.

options.name: Protecting
options.effect_text: +2 to all defenses; may grant an ally a temporary shield reducing damage by 2d6.

options.name: Soothing
options.effect_text: Vitality healing also restores Ambition equal to your spellcasting modifier.

options.name: Vengeful
options.effect_text: When hit, the attacker takes 2d4 elemental of your choice.

options.name: Dueling
options.effect_text: +2 to attacks while wielding only a single one-handed weapon.

options.name: Hand-to-Hand
options.effect_text: Add Tier to unarmed or cestus damage.

options.name: Steel & Shield
options.effect_text: +2 Defense against Compelled targets while wielding a shield.

features.notes: Uses your chosen Valiant Stance.

options.name: Dueling
options.effect_text: Enemies not engaged or compelled by you suffer −2 to hit you.

options.name: Hand-to-Hand
options.effect_text: On hit, make an additional Weapon Strike for 1 AP with no penalty.

options.name: Steel & Shield
options.effect_text: When using Deflect Strike, you may immediately make a weapon attack.

options.name: Dual Wielding
options.effect_text: +1 Defense while wielding two light weapons.

options.name: Snapshot
options.effect_text: No penalty using ranged weapons while engaged.

options.name: Lancer
options.effect_text: As a trigger, spend 1 AP to attack an enemy entering melee range while using a polearm or spear.

features.notes: Uses your chosen Warmonger’s Stance.

options.name: Dual Wielding
options.effect_text: On a critical hit, split damage between enemies in engagement.

options.name: Snapshot
options.effect_text: During Multi-Attack, strike two targets in the same engagement with +2 to hit.

options.name: Lancer
options.effect_text: On hit, make a blunt-end polearm attack for 1d6 bludgeoning.

features.notes: Uses your Valiant Stance.

options.name: Dueling
options.effect_text: Make a multi-attack roll with +2 and +1d4 extra damage vs heavy armor or heavy natural armor.

options.name: Hand-to-Hand
options.effect_text: Attack vs Body; on hit deal +2d4 bludgeoning; a critical hit stuns for 1 round.

options.name: Steel & Shield
options.effect_text: Make an attack roll adding Ambition; armor increases by the Ambition rolled until your next turn.

features.notes: Uses your Marauder style.

options.name: Dual Wielding
options.effect_text: Add Calculated Precision at no cost to attack and damage; make two Weapon Strikes; a critical hit deals maximum weapon damage.

options.name: Snapshot
options.effect_text: Dash can move two zones; each time you start in or enter a new zone, make two ranged attacks at −3; hit targets gain Strain on attacks until end of their turn.

options.name: Lancer
options.effect_text: Make attacks against each enemy along movement or reach at −3; each hit adds an extra weapon die; you remain unengaged until a miss or no valid targets remain.

features.notes: Uses your current stance.

options.name: Dueling
options.effect_text: Attack all enemies in engagement at +2 to hit; a critical hit may trigger a second attack on the same target.

options.name: Hand-to-Hand
options.effect_text: Make three unarmed or cestus attacks against different targets in engagement; if all hit, free grapple one hit target.

options.name: Steel & Shield
options.effect_text: Gain +3 armor and reflect the first melee miss back at the attacker.

options.name: Astral
options.effect_text: When you cast a spell, allies in your zone gain temporary Reservoir equal to spell tier; defensive boon +1 Body.

options.name: Occult
options.effect_text: When a spell critically hits, gain temporary vitality equal to 2 × spell tier; defensive boon +1 Mind.

options.name: Primordial
options.effect_text: When you cast an elemental spell, add the spell tier to the damage total; defensive boon +1 Will.

options.name: Wyrm
options.effect_text: When a spell critically hits, add your Tier to Armor; defensive boon +1 Armor.

features.notes: Permanent Choice Set. This feat appears to grant access to the listed spell-shape options rather than requiring an immediate single pick.

options.name: Critical Resonance
options.effect_text: Lower critical threshold by 1 for 5 Resonance; repeatable up to 3 times.

options.name: Fragmented Resonance
options.effect_text: Duplicate a single-target spell onto extra targets.

options.name: Graceful Resonance
options.effect_text: Exclude chosen targets from a zone spell.

options.name: Pursuing Resonance
options.effect_text: Reroll a missed spell attack.

options.name: Darkvision
options.effect_text: Gain darkvision.

options.name: Acute Hearing
options.effect_text: Gain Resolve on perception involving sound.

options.name: Magical Sight
options.effect_text: Detect magical auras within Touch.

options.name: Thermal Vision
options.effect_text: Gain Resolve on perception against hidden targets.

options.name: Rage
options.effect_text: Add Will to spell damage.

options.name: Sorrow
options.effect_text: Apply sapped or weakened.

options.name: Joy
options.effect_text: Heal an adjacent ally for 1d4 per spell tier.

options.name: Awe
options.effect_text: Target makes attacks with Strain for 1 round.

options.name: Decimation
options.effect_text: Add Ambition dice to damage of Decimation spells one tier below your highest.

options.name: Divination
options.effect_text: Add Ambition dice to Divination effects.

options.name: Reclamation
options.effect_text: Add Ambition dice to vitality restoration.

features.notes: Permanent Choice Set. This feat appears to grant access to the listed spell-shape options rather than requiring an immediate single pick.

options.name: Fluctuating Resonance
options.effect_text: Change damage type within category.

options.name: Acute Resonance
options.effect_text: Reroll 1s on damage once.

options.name: Reverberating Resonance
options.effect_text: Maintain a second focused spell briefly.

options.name: Shifting Resonance
options.effect_text: Alter spell area size.

options.name: Surging Resonance
options.effect_text: Add 2d4 elemental to Decimation spell damage.

options.name: Aberration
options.effect_text: Gain telepathic communion up to your Will total.

options.name: Conjuration
options.effect_text: When casting Conjuration, spend 3 design to create an arcane wall in your zone for 2 rounds.

options.name: Mortification
options.effect_text: When an ally within Close would gain downed, spend 8 design to restore vitality equal to Will.

features.notes: Uses your bloodline. Source text is inconsistent: this entry references Eidolic while Demi-Mortal uses Astral.

options.name: Eidolic
options.effect_text: Your next attack roll or skill check adds your Ambition die.

options.name: Occult
options.effect_text: Source text is currently blank or incomplete.

options.name: Primordial
options.effect_text: Gain resistance to a chosen physical or elemental damage type.

options.name: Wyrm
options.effect_text: Gain a reduction pool equal to 2 × Reservoir/Resonance spent.

options.name: Defender
options.effect_text: Weapons: longswords, shortswords, greatswords. Stance: +1 Armor while wielding a blade. Maneuver: spend 2 Adrenaline to make one Weapon Strike after a Weapon Strike.

options.name: Dueler
options.effect_text: Weapons: rapier, daggers, scimitar, fists. Stance: after you attack, gain +2 Body Defense until next turn. Maneuver: spend 2 Adrenaline to make two attacks at half damage.

options.name: Enforcer
options.effect_text: Weapons: hammers, mauls, maces, staves, shields. Stance: gain Resolve on Shove. Maneuver: spend 3 Adrenaline; all engaged enemies make a Body check or fall Prone.

options.name: Lancer
options.effect_text: Weapons: lucerne, javelin, pike, spear. Stance: +2 on next attacks when an enemy enters reach or engagement. Maneuver: spend 2 Adrenaline to attempt Grapple at Close range.

options.name: Ranger
options.effect_text: Weapons: bows, crossbows, throwing weapons. Stance: increase range by one category. Maneuver: spend 2 Adrenaline to make two ranged attacks on an undamaged target.

options.name: Slayer
options.effect_text: Weapons: cleaver, glaive, axes. Stance: first hit each turn deals +1 damage die. Maneuver: spend 2 Adrenaline; next attack deals +1 damage die per Tier.

features.notes: Choose 2 maneuvers.

options.name: Bulwark Rally
options.effect_text: You and one ally in engagement gain +1 armor defense until next turn.

options.name: Controlled Blows
options.effect_text: Reduce weapon die size (minimum d4) and gain +2 armor defense until next turn.

options.name: Counter Strike
options.effect_text: Prepare retaliation vs the next melee attack; if the attacker critically misses, gain +2 to hit.

options.name: Shield Charge
options.effect_text: Shield bash; a critical hit dazes; gain +1 to hit if not engaged.

options.name: Weapon Disarm
options.effect_text: Make a Body check to stop or drop an incoming melee weapon attack.

options.name: Reinforced Plates
options.effect_text: Reduce damage from one attack by 1d6 once per turn.

options.name: Spiked Panels
options.effect_text: Melee attackers take 1d6 puncture on critical failure; grappled foes take 1d6 puncture at the start of your turn.

options.name: Adaptive Layering
options.effect_text: Gain resistance to a chosen elemental damage type; this can be changed during Daily Preparation.

options.name: Dampening
options.effect_text: Remove loud from armor or gain Resolve on stealth if the armor lacks loud.

options.name: Adamant Stance
options.effect_text: Gain temporary vitality equal to Tier + Ambition.

options.name: Precise Focus
options.effect_text: Target Body, Mind, or Will instead of Armor.

options.name: Battlefield Control
options.effect_text: Enemies cannot Disengage unless they pass a Will check vs your Body.

features.notes: Choose 2 Disciplined Strikes. Source text for Accurate Wound appears truncated.

options.name: Accurate Wound
options.effect_text: Attack vs Body; on hit applies a rider. Source text appears truncated after crippled.

options.name: Concussive Strike
options.effect_text: Add Ambition to attack; on success deal half damage and daze.

options.name: Driving Blow
options.effect_text: After a hit, the next attack vs a different target in the same engagement gains +2 to hit and Ambition to damage.

options.name: Dragon’s Pursuit
options.effect_text: Add Ambition to attack and damage; on a critical hit vs a prone target, inflict maimed.

options.name: Sever Artery
options.effect_text: Add Ambition; a critical hit inflicts bleeding (2).

options.name: Shield Breaker
options.effect_text: Against shield users gain +4 to hit; a critical hit lowers armor by Tier.

features.notes: Uses your Signature School.

options.name: Defender
options.effect_text: Once per turn on hit, an ally in engagement gains +1 Armor.

options.name: Dueler
options.effect_text: Once per turn on hit, the target gets −2 to its next attack.

options.name: Enforcer
options.effect_text: Once per turn on hit, the target makes a Body check or is Dazed.

options.name: Lancer
options.effect_text: Once per turn on hit, gain Shove as a free action.

options.name: Ranger
options.effect_text: Once per turn on hit, the target cannot Dash.

options.name: Slayer
options.effect_text: Once per turn on hit, the target has −1 Armor until your next turn.

features.notes: Uses worn armor category rather than a separately named parent feature.

options.name: Light
options.effect_text: +1 Body Defense, Resolve on Body checks against spells, and once per respite when taking damage gain disengage and reposition without Reflex Strike.

options.name: Medium
options.effect_text: +1 Armor; may dual-wield non-Light weapons if they are from your Signature School; on a critical hit gain temporary vitality equal to Tier.

options.name: Heavy
options.effect_text: +2 Armor; gain a Damage Reduction Pool (20); unarmed attacks gain the Enforcer school benefit and deal 2d4 bludgeoning.

features.notes: This record captures the additional signature armament weapon-type choice granted by Weapon Mastery, along with that weapon type’s critical effect.

options.name: Accurate Wound
options.effect_text: Attack vs Body; on hit applies a rider. Source text appears truncated after crippled.

options.name: Concussive Strike
options.effect_text: Add Ambition to attack; on success deal half damage and daze.

options.name: Driving Blow
options.effect_text: After a hit, the next attack vs a different target in the same engagement gains +2 to hit and Ambition to damage.

options.name: Dragon’s Pursuit
options.effect_text: Add Ambition to attack and damage; on a critical hit vs a prone target, inflict maimed.

options.name: Sever Artery
options.effect_text: Add Ambition; a critical hit inflicts bleeding (2).

options.name: Shield Breaker
options.effect_text: Against shield users gain +4 to hit; a critical hit lowers armor by Tier.

features.notes: This record captures the additional signature armament weapon-type choice granted by Weapon Mastery, along with that weapon type’s critical effect.

options.name: Axes
options.effect_text: Weapon-type critical effect: extra damage and bleeding.

options.name: Bows/Crossbows
options.effect_text: Weapon-type critical effect: Restrained.

options.name: Clubs
options.effect_text: Weapon-type critical effect: knock prone or daze.

options.name: Daggers
options.effect_text: Weapon-type critical effect: immediate free extra attack.

options.name: Fists
options.effect_text: Weapon-type critical effect: free grapple or shove.

options.name: Mauls
options.effect_text: Weapon-type critical effect: weakened (1).

options.name: Polearms
options.effect_text: Weapon-type critical effect: attack an additional target within range.

options.name: Spears
options.effect_text: Weapon-type critical effect: crippled.

options.name: Swords
options.effect_text: Weapon-type critical effect: +1 armor until next turn.

features.notes: On a Signature School critical hit, choose one.

options.name: Mobility
options.effect_text: Gain dodge, disengage, or dash.

options.name: Recovery
options.effect_text: Restore 1d4 Adrenaline or 1d4 Wounds.

options.name: Frighten
options.effect_text: Apply frightened to one target in Close.

features.notes: Gain detect magic as a free utility cantrip, choose one sphere, and also gain 2 tier-1 spells from the chosen sphere that do not count against known spells.

options.name: Aberration
options.effect_text: Chosen sphere for Magic Adept.

options.name: Augmentation
options.effect_text: Chosen sphere for Magic Adept.

options.name: Conjuration
options.effect_text: Chosen sphere for Magic Adept.

options.name: Decimation
options.effect_text: Chosen sphere for Magic Adept.

options.name: Divination
options.effect_text: Chosen sphere for Magic Adept.

options.name: Mortification
options.effect_text: Chosen sphere for Magic Adept.

options.name: Reclamation
options.effect_text: Chosen sphere for Magic Adept.

features.notes: Choose a summon lore package.

options.name: Arcane / Reenergize
options.effect_text: Summon critical hit restores mana equal to 3 × its tier (minimum 3).

options.name: Forbidden / Siphoned
options.effect_text: Summon critical hit heals itself equal to your Intellect.

options.name: Nature / Evolve
options.effect_text: Summon gains fly, burrow, or swim.

options.name: Sacred / Sanctum
options.effect_text: Summon can grant 2d6 temporary vitality with its action.

options.name: Mortal / Linked
options.effect_text: If the summon is in your engagement, you may use its attribute modifiers.

features.notes: Applies to summons based on your known spheres.

options.name: Aberration
options.effect_text: 1 AP arcane mist causing attacks against you to have Strain.

options.name: Augmentation
options.effect_text: Summon can reshape into tiny wildlife form.

options.name: Conjuration
options.effect_text: Gain temporary vitality equal to highest known spell tier × 2.

options.name: Decimation
options.effect_text: Melee attacks deal 2d6 arcane.

options.name: Divination
options.effect_text: Divination magic can be cast upon the summon and travel with it.

options.name: Mortification
options.effect_text: Summon shares vitality with summoner.

options.name: Reclamation
options.effect_text: 1 AP to gain +3 armor and −2 attacks.

features.notes: Choose augmentation(s) to apply during Daily Preparation. The source sets the maximum number applied equal to your current tier.

options.name: Arcane Targeting
options.effect_text: +1 attack rolls on weapons.

options.name: Automatic Feed
options.effect_text: Reduce reload by 1.

options.name: Arcane Parcel
options.effect_text: Double carry weight on armor.

options.name: Cantrip Prism
options.effect_text: Increase cantrip die from d4 to d6.

options.name: Spell Tuner
options.effect_text: +1 spell attacks and spell DCs.

options.name: Shield Weave
options.effect_text: +1 armor.

options.name: Spell Weave
options.effect_text: +1 Body, Mind, and Will.

options.name: Winged Boots
options.effect_text: Once per respite, free dash.

features.notes: Choose one during Daily Preparation.

options.name: Efficient Casting
options.effect_text: Spells one tier below your tier cost 2 less Reservoir.

options.name: Overcharged
options.effect_text: Direct and zone spells gain +2 attack rolls and +2 spell DCs, but cost +4 Reservoir.

features.notes: Choose one forgecast module.

options.name: Baseline Directive
options.effect_text: Regains both action and maneuver.

options.name: Bulwark Directive
options.effect_text: +2 Armor and can intercept one attack per combat.

options.name: Siege Directive
options.effect_text: Gains a ranged attack dealing 2d8 arcane.

options.name: Scout Directive
options.effect_text: Cannot attack; gains +2 zones on dash; grants you sight and hearing from its position until next turn.

features.notes: Choose a known spell of spell tier equal to half your Tier; options are dynamic and depend on the character’s current known-spell list.
Choose one module at Daily Preparation.

options.name: Tacticians Compass
options.effect_text: Once per day, add Tier to group initiative.

options.name: Alchemical Harness
options.effect_text: Store 1 alchemical item and use it with a free action.

options.name: Jury-rigged Kit
options.effect_text: Emulate 1 kit; uses equal to Tier.

features.notes: Choose one manuscript. Scaling uses Mercenary tier.

options.name: Agent
options.effect_text: Gain Undercut.

options.name: Berserker
options.effect_text: Gain Berserker Rage.

options.name: Duelist
options.effect_text: Gain Cadence and Precision Strike.

options.name: Fighter
options.effect_text: Gain Adrenaline and Second Breath.

options.name: Vescent
options.effect_text: Gain Soulglyph.

options.name: Warden
options.effect_text: Gain Spell Scourge.

features.notes: Gain another manuscript from the same manuscript list.

options.name: Agent
options.effect_text: Gain Undercut.

options.name: Berserker
options.effect_text: Gain Berserker Rage.

options.name: Duelist
options.effect_text: Gain Cadence and Precision Strike.

options.name: Fighter
options.effect_text: Gain Adrenaline and Second Breath.

options.name: Vescent
options.effect_text: Gain Soulglyph.

options.name: Warden
options.effect_text: Gain Spell Scourge.

options.name: Push the assault
options.effect_text: An ally gains dash and makes a single attack during movement.

options.name: Stand fast
options.effect_text: Allies in your zone gain +2 armor until the end of your next turn.

options.name: Stop them
options.effect_text: Allies in your zone may attack a target using disengage.

options.name: Get out of there
options.effect_text: Two allies in your zone swap places, ignoring movement and disengage rules.

features.notes: Choose a classification as your studied enemy; gain Resolve on related investigation and add Ambition to damage rolls.

options.name: Studied Enemy Classification
options.effect_text: Dynamic classification choice; the source does not enumerate the full classification list in this entry.

features.notes: Improves your selected Field Kit module.

options.name: Tacticians Compass
options.effect_text: Now usable twice per day.

options.name: Alchemical Harness
options.effect_text: Now holds 2 alchemical items.

options.name: Jury-rigged Kit
options.effect_text: Uses equal to twice Tier.

features.notes: Gain access to the tier 1 core feat related to your manuscript.

options.name: Agent
options.effect_text: Gain access to the Agent-related tier 1 core feat.

options.name: Berserker
options.effect_text: Gain access to the Berserker-related tier 1 core feat.

options.name: Duelist
options.effect_text: Gain access to the Duelist-related tier 1 core feat.

options.name: Fighter
options.effect_text: Gain access to the Fighter-related tier 1 core feat.

options.name: Vescent
options.effect_text: Gain access to the Vescent-related tier 1 core feat.

options.name: Warden
options.effect_text: Gain access to the Warden-related tier 1 core feat.

features.notes: Choose one Tether Aspect.

options.name: Aspect of Aberration
options.effect_text: Hostile tethered creatures suffer 1d4 on attack rolls against anyone other than you.

options.name: Aspect of Authority
options.effect_text: When you damage a tethered creature with a phantasm or cord, deal +1d4 psychic.

options.name: Aspect of Solace
options.effect_text: Allies tethered to you gain 1 + Tier to an Attribute Defense of your choice.

options.name: Aspect of Vestige
options.effect_text: When you or a tethered target are attacked, one attack gains Strain once per round.

features.notes: Pick 2 cords.

options.name: Kinesis
options.effect_text: Move loose objects up to 5 lb; Stitch increases this to 45 lb.

options.name: Render
options.effect_text: Ranged cord dealing 1d6 fire or slash + spellcasting modifier; Stitch increases die size.

options.name: Eviscerate
options.effect_text: Attack vs Mind for 2d4 psychic; Stitch adds modifier to damage and critical hit dazes.

options.name: Mirage
options.effect_text: Gain half-cover and immunity to Reflex Strikes until next turn; Stitch extends to one ally in Close.

options.name: Nullify
options.effect_text: Attack vs Will for 1d8 psychic + spellcasting modifier; Stitch forces the target to lose 1 AP or take +1d4 psychic.

features.notes: Choose one Thread style.

options.name: Gnosis
options.effect_text: Trigger for 2 Threads to give Resolve or Strain on a save against a magical effect.

options.name: Kardia
options.effect_text: Spend AP/Threads to heal 2d6 vitality, with range expansion.

options.name: Thara
options.effect_text: When using Ambition on a skill check, attack roll, or spell attack, increase the Ambition die by one step.

features.notes: Uses your chosen Tether Aspect.

options.name: Aberration
options.effect_text: Penalty die becomes 1d6; may spend 1 Reservoir to add Tier.

options.name: Authority
options.effect_text: Bonus psychic damage scales further.

options.name: Solace
options.effect_text: Tethered allies gain Resolve on skill and spell checks once per minute.

options.name: Vestige
options.effect_text: Misses caused by Strain deal 1d6 psychic.

features.notes: Uses your chosen Weaving Style.

options.name: Gnosis
options.effect_text: Gain extra Threads equal to Tier.

options.name: Kardia
options.effect_text: Add your spellcasting modifier to vitality healing.

options.name: Thara
options.effect_text: Add Ambition dice to Cord damage.

features.notes: Collapse a phantasm for one effect.

options.name: Barrier
options.effect_text: Reduce incoming damage by 2d6 + spellcasting modifier.

options.name: Clarification
options.effect_text: End Enraged, Frightened, Stunned, Dazed, or Inert.

options.name: Rupture
options.effect_text: Your next attack gains +1d12 psychic; if Ambition is used, add your Ambition die too.

options.name: Honor
options.effect_text: Themes: Order, Light, Justice. Anathema: Chaos or Ruin. Boon: smite vs anathema gains +1d8 ether or void.

options.name: Serenity
options.effect_text: Themes: Nature, Life, Balance, Growth. Anathema: Ruin. Boon: healing gains +1d4.

options.name: Dominion
options.effect_text: Themes: Knowledge, War, Protection. Anathema: Neutral or Chaos. Boon: gain Martial armament and Medium protection proficiency.

options.name: Entropy
options.effect_text: Themes: Death, Forbidden, Decay. Anathema: Order. Boon: gain Mortification sphere and +1d4 void/ether on spell damage against damaged targets.

options.name: Paradox
options.effect_text: Themes: Arcane, Deception, Revelation. Anathema: Order or Neutral. Boon: gain arcane needle and may convert spell damage to arcane.

features.notes: Activation Menu / Derived Branch. Based on Creed.

options.name: Honor
options.effect_text: Aura lets allies add your Ambition die to checks once per round.

options.name: Serenity
options.effect_text: Healing splashes 1d4 vitality to a nearby ally, up to Tier uses or targets.

options.name: Dominion
options.effect_text: Choose a nearby target; attacks and spell attacks against it gain Resolve.

options.name: Entropy
options.effect_text: When damaging an already-damaged close target, deal +1d4 void or ether.

options.name: Paradox
options.effect_text: On damaging a target, may impose Strain on its next attack against someone else; critical success expands this.

features.notes: Source incomplete. The feat clearly branches by Creed when you cast smite, but the per-Creed effect list is not present in the current text. It still clearly grants upgraded armor proficiency and Decimation access.

Source incomplete. The feat branches by Creed, but the per-Creed emit effects are not present in the current text. It still upgrades the Herald to Full-caster, adds an extra Tier 1 spell, and grants Reclamation access.

options.name: Honor
options.effect_text: Allies gain Resolve vs emotional conditions; enemies suffer Strain to inflict them.

options.name: Serenity
options.effect_text: Once per turn, split incoming damage between you and an ally.

options.name: Dominion
options.effect_text: Allies starting their turn in the aura gain a Reduction Pool = 1d4 + Tier.

options.name: Entropy
options.effect_text: Damaged enemies in the aura may be forced to make a Mind check or their Maneuvers cost +1 AP.

options.name: Paradox
options.effect_text: Once per turn, reduce an ally’s critical hit to a normal hit and gain Resolve on your next attack.

features.notes: During Daily Preparation choose one Nemesis from your Creed list. Marked Nemesis effects: the target cannot hide from you; you gain Resolve to track, shove, and grapple them; and their Dash/Disengage improves your pursuit economy.

options.name: Honor
options.effect_text: Choose one of: Deathless, Mortals, Monstrosities, Occult.

options.name: Serenity
options.effect_text: Choose one of: Deathless, Forged, Occult, Wyrms.

options.name: Dominion
options.effect_text: Choose one of: Monstrosities, Primordial, Wildlife, Wyrms.

options.name: Entropy
options.effect_text: Choose one of: Eidolic, Mortals, Primordial, Wildlife.

options.name: Paradox
options.effect_text: Choose one of: Eidolic, Forged, Occult, Primordial.

features.notes: Also learn 2 additional spells from the granted sphere.

options.name: Honor
options.effect_text: Gain Divination.

options.name: Serenity
options.effect_text: Gain Reclamation.

options.name: Dominion
options.effect_text: Gain Decimation.

options.name: Entropy
options.effect_text: Gain Conjuration.

options.name: Paradox
options.effect_text: Gain Augmentation.

options.name: Honor
options.effect_text: Gain Guidance as a touch cantrip, once per hour per target.

options.name: Serenity
options.effect_text: Gain Healing Word as a touch cantrip, once per hour per target.

options.name: Dominion
options.effect_text: Gain Turn the Heretic as an engagement-sized burst cantrip; success grants temporary immunity.

options.name: Entropy
options.effect_text: Gain Grave Touch as a touch cantrip.

options.name: Paradox
options.effect_text: Gain Torment as a touch cantrip.

features.notes: Gain another Ascendant Boon from another Creed. You do not gain the other Creed’s full benefits, only its Ascendant Boon.

options.name: Honor
options.effect_text: Aura lets allies add your Ambition die to checks once per round.

options.name: Serenity
options.effect_text: Healing splashes 1d4 vitality to a nearby ally, up to Tier uses or targets.

options.name: Dominion
options.effect_text: Choose a nearby target; attacks and spell attacks against it gain Resolve.

options.name: Entropy
options.effect_text: When damaging an already-damaged close target, deal +1d4 void or ether.

options.name: Paradox
options.effect_text: On damaging a target, may impose Strain on its next attack against someone else; critical success expands this.

options.name: Aegis
options.effect_text: While using a shield, add Armor bonus to Body and Mind defense.

options.name: Inquisition
options.effect_text: Gain 1 additional Tool proficiency and 1 additional V.I.T.A.L.S proficiency; gain Resolve on Scan and Intuition/Awareness checks involving Mortals.

options.name: Severance
options.effect_text: Gain +Tier to attack and damage vs Magical targets; on a critical hit, the target’s next Cast a Spell has Strain.

options.name: Thorns
options.effect_text: Once per turn when a target in engagement uses Disengage, attack with Bound Armament; on hit deal damage equal to spellcasting modifier and prevent Dash until end of your next turn.

options.name: Veil
options.effect_text: Learn Protection from the Inhuman; gain Resolve on Scan and Intuition/Awareness involving Eidolic or Occult.

options.name: Aberration
options.effect_text: Gain Resonant Distortion.

options.name: Augmentation
options.effect_text: Gain Fleet Footing.

options.name: Conjuration
options.effect_text: Gain Imbue with Elements.

options.name: Decimation
options.effect_text: Gain Seeking Bolt.

options.name: Divination
options.effect_text: Gain Detect the Inhumane.

options.name: Mortification
options.effect_text: Gain Torment.

options.name: Reclamation
options.effect_text: Gain Healing Word.

features.notes: Choose 2 pieces of information about a target.

options.name: Resistance
options.effect_text: Learn the target’s resistance.

options.name: Immunity
options.effect_text: Learn the target’s immunity.

options.name: Weakness
options.effect_text: Learn the target’s weakness.

options.name: Weakest Defense
options.effect_text: Learn the target’s weakest defense.

features.notes: Based on bound armament damage type.

options.name: Slashing
options.effect_text: May target Body; a critical hit inflicts burning equal to Tier, but as arcane.

options.name: Piercing
options.effect_text: May target Mind; a critical hit lowers armor by Tier against the next attack.

options.name: Bludgeoning
options.effect_text: May target Will; a critical hit applies an attack-roll penalty equal to Tier until end of the target’s turn.

features.notes: Choose one remnant to learn.

options.name: Chaotic
options.effect_text: Reroll 1s on attack and skill rolls once while below half vitality or wounds.

options.name: Disruption
options.effect_text: Once per target, hitting a spellcaster gives their next spell attack Strain.

options.name: Dissipation
options.effect_text: Once per rest, attempt to collapse an incoming spell of equal or lower Tier.

options.name: Glint
options.effect_text: Once per respite reduce damage by 1d12 and teleport 1 zone away.

options.name: Prism
options.effect_text: Once per respite, elemental damage grants matching resistance and empowers your next attack with 2d4 of that element.

options.name: Phoenix
options.effect_text: Once per day, when taking damage that would also cause Wounds, reduce that damage to 0 and remain at 1 vitality.

features.notes: Choose one proficiency group.

options.name: V.I.T.A.L.S
options.effect_text: Gain one proficiency from the V.I.T.A.L.S. skill list.

options.name: Tools
options.effect_text: Gain one tool proficiency.

options.name: Warrior
options.effect_text: +1 Armor Defense while wearing armor.

options.name: Mother
options.effect_text: +1 success on Medicine checks.

options.name: Trickster
options.effect_text: +1 success on Stealth checks.

options.name: Lord
options.effect_text: +1 Will.

options.name: Magi
options.effect_text: +1 Mind.

options.name: Tracker
options.effect_text: Attack: 1d6 Puncture. Special: gain Resolve on Lore (Nature) and Intuition checks to track or identify wildlife.

options.name: Prowler
options.effect_text: Attack: 1d6 Slash. Special: gain Resolve on Stealth; enemies have Strain to detect it in dim light or foliage.

options.name: Guardian
options.effect_text: Attack: 1d6 Blunt. Special: while in the same engagement you gain +1 Armor Defense; companion can Distract for 1 AP once per turn.

options.name: Burrower
options.effect_text: Attack: 1d6 Blunt. Special: ignores difficult terrain and grants Resolve on finding natural hazards or hidden burrows.

features.notes: Choose one proficiency group.

options.name: V.I.T.A.L.S
options.effect_text: Gain one proficiency from the V.I.T.A.L.S. skill list.

options.name: Tools
options.effect_text: Gain one tool proficiency.

options.effect_text: Attack: 1d6 Slash. Special: gain Resolve on Stealth; enemies have Strain to detect it in dim light or foliage.

features.notes: Gain one Fighter maneuver from the Fighter Signature School list, usable once per respite.

options.name: Defender
options.effect_text: Make one Weapon Strike after a Weapon Strike.

options.name: Dueler
options.effect_text: Make two attacks at half damage.

options.name: Enforcer
options.effect_text: All engaged enemies make a Body check or fall Prone.

options.name: Lancer
options.effect_text: Attempt Grapple at Close.

options.name: Ranger
options.effect_text: Make two ranged attacks on an undamaged target.

options.name: Slayer
options.effect_text: Your next attack deals +1 damage die per Tier.

features.notes: Choose a weapon type (short sword, spear, dagger, etc.); gain proficiency with it and +1 to attacks and damage. Options are dynamic and not fully enumerated in the source excerpt.
Flagged as a secondary menu rather than a primary sub-feat pick.

options.name: Resistance
options.effect_text: Gain resistance to the next damage for 1 minute.

options.name: Will Surge
options.effect_text: Add Will to an attack or damage roll.

options.name: Ambition Surge
options.effect_text: Add Ambition to any roll with no failure penalty.

features.notes: Flagged as a secondary menu rather than a primary sub-feat pick. The selectable outcomes are gated by result tier: on success choose Dazed or Compelled; on critical success choose Enraged or Frightened.

options.name: Dazed
options.effect_text: On success, choose Dazed.

options.name: Compelled
options.effect_text: On success, choose Compelled.

options.name: Enraged
options.effect_text: On critical success, choose Enraged.

options.name: Frightened
options.effect_text: On critical success, choose Frightened.

features.notes: Flagged as a secondary menu rather than a primary sub-feat pick.

options.name: Offense Aura
options.effect_text: +2 to all Attack Rolls.

options.name: Defense Aura
options.effect_text: +2 to all Stat Defense.

options.name: Insight Aura
options.effect_text: Gain Resolve on Intuition and Social checks.
